## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Infrastructure change
- [ ] CI/CD or workflow change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Project dependencies update
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR/commit(s) indicates a related JIRA ticket.
- [ ] The PR/commit(s) message details what was changed, and why.
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Code check passes (`make code-check`)
- [ ] CloudFormation template validation passes (`make lint-templates -j`)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`) updated if needed

## Addtional

<!-- Describe any breaking changes and migration steps, or "n/a" -->

- [ ] Breaking changes introduced, migration steps added
- [ ] Requires project version update
- [ ] Requires manual deployment steps
